about.tagline: Local-first notes, tasks, and calendar. Your data stays in your vault.

accent.desc: Used for highlights, selection, focus, and the editor.
accent.label: Accent color

colorTheme.desc: Dark, light, or follow your system.
colorTheme.label: Color theme

density.desc: Compact tightens the editor reading area.
density.label: Density

fontSize.desc: Overall text and UI scale. Applied when you close Settings.
fontSize.label: Font size
fontSize.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

preset.desc: A complete color palette, applied over light and dark.
preset.label: Theme preset

calendar.calendarsDesc: Read-only subscriptions — Google, Outlook, or any ICS URL (incl. secret iCal links).

duration.desc: Length of a newly created event.
duration.label: Default event duration

eventLead.desc: How long before a timed event starts to notify.
eventLead.label: Event reminder

calendar.urlPlaceholder: ICS URL (e.g. Google/Outlook secret iCal address)

weekStart.desc: First day of the calendar grid.
weekStart.label: Week starts on

autosave.desc: How long after you stop typing the note is saved.
autosave.label: Autosave delay

readingMode.desc: Open notes in a rendered, non-editable view by default.
readingMode.label: Reading mode by default

typing.desc: Lower reacts faster to keystrokes but uses a little more CPU.
typing.label: Typing responsiveness

ai.desc: Master switch: editor actions (summarize, compose, rewrite) plus every AI sub-feature below.
ai.label: AI assistance

aiMetaSuggestions.desc: The “Suggest metadata” button in a note's metadata strip.
aiMetaSuggestions.label: Metadata suggestions

features.aiSetupOffer: Next: connect a provider and build the semantic index in Settings › AI.

aiTemplates.desc: Your own prompt templates in the AI menu.
aiTemplates.label: Custom AI actions

ambient.desc: Suggest links and metadata in the background after an edit settles. Costs tokens, so it is a separate opt-in.
ambient.label: Ambient suggestions

backlinks.desc: The links panel with backlinks and unlinked mentions.
backlinks.label: Backlinks

blockRefs.desc: Give a block an ^id and embed it elsewhere with ((^id)).
blockRefs.label: Block references

calendar.desc: The calendar with your own events.
calendar.label: Calendar view

canvas.desc: Freeform boards for notes and ideas.
canvas.label: Canvas

codeHighlight.desc: Syntax colors in code blocks; grammars load only when needed.
codeHighlight.label: Code highlighting

dailyNotes.desc: One journal note per day, created on demand.
dailyNotes.label: Daily notes

entityGraph.desc: Extract people, places, and topics from notes into a browsable graph. Extraction costs tokens.
entityGraph.label: Entity graph

git.desc: Version the vault with git — same switch as Settings › Sync.
git.label: Git sync

graphView.desc: The interactive map of links between notes.
graphView.label: Graph view

mermaid.desc: Render mermaid code blocks as diagrams.
mermaid.label: Mermaid diagrams

outline.desc: The headings outline in the editor's right rail.
outline.label: Outline panel

p2pSync.desc: End-to-end encrypted sync directly between your devices.
p2pSync.label: Device sync (P2P)

pdfAnnotate.desc: Open PDFs and link highlights to notes.
pdfAnnotate.label: PDF annotation

plugins.desc: Run vault-local plugins that can add commands.
plugins.label: Plugins

properties.desc: Structured frontmatter properties and relations with their panel.
properties.label: Typed properties

queryEngine.desc: Saved database-style queries over your notes and tasks.
queryEngine.label: Query views

reindexOffer.text: Existing notes need one reindex to pick up their block ids.

relatedNotes.desc: A panel of semantically similar notes. Needs the embeddings index from Settings › AI.
relatedNotes.label: Related notes

reminders.desc: System notifications for due tasks and upcoming events.
reminders.label: Reminders

features.sectionAiDesc: Everything here needs a configured AI provider and only runs while the master switch is on.
features.sectionStorageDesc: Switching a feature off keeps its data. Deleting here frees the space — everything can be rebuilt, but rebuilding may cost downloads or tokens.
features.sectionWorkspaceDesc: Hide whole views for a leaner app — notes always stay.

embeddings.confirmBody: Removes every stored note vector and the local model cache (all vaults share the model). Rebuilding embeds every note again.
embeddings.desc: Stored note vectors plus the ~130 MB local model cache. Rebuild any time from Settings › AI.
embeddings.label: Semantic index

entities.confirmBody: Removes every extracted entity and mention. Notes are untouched; re-extraction costs tokens.
entities.desc: The extracted people, places and topics. Extracting again costs tokens.
entities.label: Entity graph

voiceModel.confirmBody: Removes the downloaded transcription model (shared by all vaults). The next transcription downloads it again (~142 MB).
voiceModel.descDownloaded: {{mb}} MB on disk. It re-downloads on the next transcription.
voiceModel.label: Voice model

taskExtract.desc: Turn a note's contents into tasks with one action.
taskExtract.label: Task extraction

tasks.desc: The task list and kanban board. Tasks in notes keep working either way.
tasks.label: Tasks view

todayView.desc: The daily agenda combining due tasks and events.
todayView.label: Today view

transclusion.desc: Render ![[note]] embeds inline, up to three levels deep.
transclusion.label: Embedded notes

vaultChat.desc: Chat with your notes — answers cite the notes they come from.
vaultChat.label: Vault chat

voice.desc: Record meetings and transcribe them on this device (downloads a ~142 MB model on first use).
voice.label: Voice notes

weeklyReview.desc: An AI-written look back over your week; the plain digest stays available without it.
weeklyReview.label: AI weekly review

defaultTaskView.desc: List, board, or agenda when opening Tasks.
defaultTaskView.label: Default task view

inboxPath.desc: Note that receives tasks for the Inbox strategy.
inboxPath.label: Inbox path

recentNotes.desc: How many recently opened notes to keep (this device).
recentNotes.label: Recent notes

startView.desc: Which view opens when you launch Novalis.
startView.label: Start view

strategy.desc: Where new tasks are filed by default.
strategy.label: Strategy

import.desc: Bring notes from another app into this vault. Imports land in their own subfolder and never overwrite existing notes.

language.hint: Applies to this device. Changes take effect immediately.
language.label: Display language

navigation.railDesc: Reorder the views in the left activity rail. Which views are available is managed in Settings › Features.

plugins.empty: No plugins installed. Drop a plugin folder into <2>.novalis/plugins/</2> in your vault (see PLUGINS.md), then reopen Settings.

authorEmail.desc: Recorded as the commit author email.
authorEmail.label: Author email

enabled.desc: Creates a repository in the vault and commits changes automatically.
enabled.label: Enable Git versioning

git.desc: Records every change to the vault in a local Git repository. Syncing to a remote comes in a later update.
git.title: Git versioning

interval.desc: How long to wait between automatic commits.
interval.label: Auto-commit interval

merge.description: These files were edited on this device and on the remote. Choose which version to keep for each file — Novalis then completes the merge and syncs.
merge.empty: Nothing to resolve — the histories may have moved on. Close this dialog and sync again.
merge.title: Resolve merge conflicts
merge.unsavedError: “{{path}}” has unsaved changes that could not be saved — fix that first. The merge was not completed.

outcome.conflicted: Both sides edited {{n}} file(s) — merge stopped
outcome.diverged: Both sides have new commits ({{ahead}} local, {{behind}} remote) — resolve manually
outcome.merged: Merged {{behind}} remote commit(s) with {{ahead}} local commit(s)

p2p.desc: Sync directly between your own devices with no server. File contents are end-to-end encrypted, so only your paired devices can read them. An opt-in alternative to Git sync.
p2p.disabledHint: Turn on device sync in Settings › Features to pair devices and sync.

outcome.conflicts: {{n}} file(s) diverged and were left for you to resolve in the conflict view
outcome.skippedOversize: {{n}} file(s) skipped — larger than the 64 MiB sync limit
outcome.unreachable: No paired device was reachable — try again when both are online

pair.desc: Create a code on one device, then paste it on the other. Anyone with the code can read this vault — share it privately.
pair.joinLabel: Have a code from another device?
pair.ticketLabel: Pairing code — copy it to your other device
pair.title: Pair a device

p2p.title: Peer-to-peer sync (end-to-end encrypted)

remote.conflictedHint: These files were edited on both sides and can't be merged automatically. Novalis left your files untouched — resolve each file in the conflict view, then Novalis completes the merge and syncs.
remote.desc: Sync the vault with a Git host over HTTPS (GitHub, GitLab, self-hosted). Requires a personal access token with write access.
remote.divergedHint: Local and remote histories have diverged. Novalis never force-pushes — resolve the divergence with a git client, then sync again.
remote.title: Remote

token.desc: Personal access token, stored in the OS keychain — it never leaves this device.
token.label: Access token
token.saved: A token is stored in the keychain for this vault.

url.desc: HTTPS URL of the repository, e.g. a private GitHub repo.
url.label: Repository URL

repo.title: Repository
repo.uninitializedDesc: Enable Git versioning or commit once to create it.

tasks.columnsDesc: Columns shown in the board view.

templates.desc: Reusable note scaffolds available when creating a note.

vault.switchDesc: Open a different folder as your vault.
